name: Synco X-Talk X2 Wireless Intercom System with 2 Single Ear Headsets
description: The Synco X-Talk X2 is a full-duplex wireless intercom system engineered to provide clear communication in a comfortable true-wireless design with no bodypack or hub required.

features.Key Features:: Easy-to-Use Low-Power 2.4 GHz System | 2 Single-Ear Headsets, No Hub Needed | Full-Duplex, Use Any Headset as Master | True Wireless Headset, No Bodypack | Audio Echo Cancellation (AEC) | Expandable to 18 Headsets with Groups | Comfortable Padded Ear Cushions | 1148' Operating Range | 24-Hour Battery Life, 3.5mm Monitor Jack | Rechargeable Batteries, Charger & Cables
features.What's in the box?: Synco X-Talk X2 Wireless Intercom System with 2 Single-Ear Headsets (2.4 GHz) | 2 x Headset | 2 x Rechargeable Battery | 2 x One-Ear Foam Cushion | 2 x Mic Windsreen | 2 x USB Cable | Charging Station | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
